$comment: Single source of truth for all version numbers. Edit ONLY this file — sync-versions.js (run via predev/prebuild hooks or `node sync-versions.js`) propagates values to seanime-web/package.json, seanime-denshi/package.json, and internal/constants/constants.go automatically.

updater.notes: Auto-update is pulled from github.com/AureliusGilchrist/seaserver releases for BOTH the Go server binary and the Electron client.

themes.notes: Versioned per-theme inside seanime-themes/index.json; no global version.
